title: La Cenicienta y Ernesto
writer: Ángel A. Jordán, Vicente Coello, Vicente Escrivá
actors: Antonella Lualdi, Antonio Garisa, Franco Interlenghi
plot: Julia, a shoe store clerk, dreams of marrying Lieutenant Ernesto, a very handsome young man. To fulfill her dream, a "fate" will appear, named Felipe, a cheeky lawyer who will turn Cinderella into the heiress of a millionaire marq...
